query_normalized: bayesian nonparametrics for anomaly detection in time series computational statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it provides a foundational nonparametric methodology (energy distance) for analyzing time series distributions, which is a canonical approach for detecting structural anomalies or deviations in multivariate time series without assuming a specific parametric model.
